description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Golang Lint and Unit Test - go-client. The workflow should trigger on pull requests to master, release branches, ci-test, and dev branches, as well as on workflow dispatch. It should include two jobs: Lint and Test. The Lint job checks out the repository, sets up Go 1.14, and runs golangci-lint v1.29 on the go-client directory. The Test job checks out the repository, sets up Go 1.14, runs a test script, and uploads coverage to Codecov.
